title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Smartr Logistics

jsonLd.title: Opening for Logistics Manager at Smartr Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Smartr Logistics! We are hiring a Logistics Manager for our Vadodara team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Smartr Logistics:
Smartr Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Smartr Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
